sourceMovie.title: Sorry, Baby
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Sorry, Baby for the same reason it broke through in 2025: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a comedy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Eva Victor keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The drama and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Stranger Than Fiction
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sorry, Baby clicked for you, Stranger Than Fiction (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Sorry, Baby?
faq.answer: Try Stranger Than Fiction, Kinds of Kindness, May—each shares DNA with Sorry, Baby while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Sorry, Baby?
faq.answer: Sorry, Baby (2025) is best described as Drama, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Sorry, Baby worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
